nasb.text: When she was in severe labor the midwife said to her, “Do not fear, for now you have another son.”

esv.text: And when her labor was at its hardest, the midwife said to her, “Do not fear, for you have another son.”

cnv.text: 她正在極辛苦的時候，接生婆對她說：“不要怕，你這次又得了一個兒子。”

ccb.text: 在难产的痛苦中，接生婆对她说：“不要害怕，你又添了一个儿子！”

csbs.text: 在她难产的时候，接生婆对她说：“不要害怕，你这次又要有一个儿子了！”
